items.title: Neutral Item Entry
items.description: The item form now says Add item instead of Add grocery item, so lists can cover party, home, grocery, or any other use.

items.title: Flexible Details Field
items.description: The optional item field is now labeled Qty, note, or type to make its flexible purpose clearer.

items.title: Version in About
items.description: The About section now shows the current app version for easier support and troubleshooting.

items.title: No Behavior Change
items.description: List data, sharing, and sync behavior are unchanged.
